creator: gjb@FreeBSD.org
text:
On Sun, Jan 06, 2013 at 07:40:01PM +0000, J B wrote:
> The following reply was made to PR ports/174979; it has been noted by GNATS.
> 
> From: J B <jb.1234abcd@gmail.com>
> To: bug-followup@FreeBSD.org, jb.1234abcd@gmail.com
> Cc:  
> Subject: Re: ports/174979: misc/freebsd-doc-en build error
> Date: Sun, 6 Jan 2013 20:39:40 +0100
> 
>  # portmaster --list-origins |grep docproj
>  textproc/docproj-jadetex
>  #

Hi,

Please see the 20130103 entry in /usr/ports/UPDATING to change the port
origin.  The textproc/docproj-jadetex port has been removed in favor of
textproc/docproj.

Glen
